evals.prompt: Create a PRD for a task management app with kanban boards and team collaboration features
evals.expected_output: A complete PRD saved to .prism/shared/plans/ with DATE-task-management-PRD.md naming, covering problem statement, target users, feature list with priorities, technical requirements, risks, and success metrics
expectations: Document contains sections: Problem Statement, Target Users, Features, Technical Requirements, Risks, Success Metrics
Companion document options are offered after PRD generation

evals.prompt: I have an idea for a mobile fitness tracking app. Can you help me document the product requirements?
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers correctly, checks for existing context via prism-locator agent, invokes /generate_prd command, saves output to .prism/shared/plans/, and offers next workflow steps
expectations: Skill checks for existing research/documentation before starting
Output is saved to .prism/shared/plans/ directory with correct naming convention

evals.prompt: Generate a lightweight PRD for a simple landing page builder MVP
evals.expected_output: A lightweight PRD focused on core sections only, respecting the depth calibration guidance for startup/MVP level
expectations: PRD depth matches lightweight/MVP calibration — not enterprise-level exhaustive detail
Quality gates are checked: problem statement, target user, features, feasibility, scope, metrics, risks, open questions
TodoWrite is used to track PRD items
